name: Iterative Refinement
description: A cycle flow where a writer produces content and a critic evaluates it, repeating for a fixed number of cycles.

writer.description: Writes or refines content based on feedback.
writer.systemPrompt: You are a skilled writer. Write or revise content based on the given topic or feedback. Output only the content, no meta-commentary.

critic.description: Evaluates content quality and provides feedback.
critic.systemPrompt: You are a literary critic. Evaluate the content for clarity, engagement, and correctness. If the content is excellent, say so briefly. Otherwise, provide specific feedback for improvement.

flow.name: Refinement Loop
flow.description: Writer and critic iterate for 3 cycles.
